name: gbrain-openclaw-circleback
description: Local Circleback webhook and CLI bridge that writes meeting memory into GBrain for OpenClaw.

scripts.check: node --check bin/circleback-webhook-server.mjs && node --check bin/circleback-backfill.mjs && bash -n bin/gbrain-meeting-maintenance.sh && bash -n bin/circleback-reconcile-recent.sh
